title: Mora Sponsi, The Stay Of The Bridegroom.
content:
The time the bridegroom stays from hence
    Is but the time of penitence.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Mora Sponsi, The Stay Of The Bridegroom."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
